title: Oreo Cookies
description: A cream-filled sandwich cookie consisting of two (usually chocolate) wafers with a sweet cream filling.
body:
# Oreo Cookies

yeah, that's it

## Versions
There are two versions of this pack:
 - The "vanilla" one, wich changes normal cookies into oreos and that's it.
 - The "CIT" version, wich changes normal cookies, but also lets you "personalize" cookies by naming them with certain keywords. Requires Optifine or another mod compatible with Optifine's CIT, i'd recomend [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)


### Naming for the CIT Version:
The name syntax is:
[Cookie type] [Filler type] Oreo

The current cookie types are:
 - Classic (Skip the cookie type step)
 - Triple
 - Mini
 - Red Velvet
 - Triple Red Velvet
 - Mini Red Velvet
 - Vanilla
 - Triple Vanilla
 - Mini Vanilla

The current fillers are:
 - Classic (Skip the filler step)
 - Lime
 - Chocolate
 - Dark Chocolate
 - Strawberry
 - Peanut Butter
 - Cookies and Cream

Here is an image with all possible variations: 

![Oreo Cookies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rKriEfdt/images/5abc291f92ae6e4cf4cb4e30bc627af755f12c3e.png)
